_comment: Committed answer-quality floor for the Prompter eval CI gate (P-19, .github/workflows/eval.yml).
PLACEHOLDER THRESHOLDS. These were seeded WITHOUT a real run because the harness needs Voyage +
Anthropic keys and a live pgvector corpus that are not available at authoring time. Regenerate them
from a real run once the secrets exist, and commit the observed scores as the floor:
1. docker compose up -d && dotnet run --project Source -- index
3. open the newest Eval/results/report-*.json and copy summary.citationHitRate,
summary.refusalAccuracy and summary.meanGroundedness into 'metrics' below (round down a touch),
then commit. See Eval/README.md ('The CI gate') for the full procedure.
The keys under 'metrics' MUST match the summary keys the harness emits (Eval/EvalReport.cs, ToJson()):
citationHitRate  — in-scope citation-hit rate, a fraction in [0, 1]
refusalAccuracy  — out-of-scope refusal accuracy, a fraction in [0, 1]
meanGroundedness — mean groundedness of in-scope answers, on a 1-5 scale
'tolerance' is subtracted from each floor before comparison, absorbing small run-to-run noise; a metric
fails the gate only when observed < floor - tolerance.
